title: Broken Links
steps: Navigate to <https://practice.expandtesting.com> and click on the following links: 'Download Secure', 'Basic Auth', 'Digest Auth'.
bug_explanation: Found broken links with error codes 401.

title: Broken Image
steps: Check if there are any broken images on the website.
expected_result: No broken images should be found.
bug_explanation: Found no broken images but there might be some in the future.

title: Missing Label for Search Input Field
steps: Inspect the search input field 'search-input' to verify if it has a corresponding label.
expected_result: The search input field should have a label associated with it.
bug_explanation: Input field 'search-input' is missing a label.

title: Extremely Long Load Time
expected_result: The website should have a reasonable load time.
bug_explanation: Website has an extremely long load time of -1778319291980 ms.

title: Missing Security Headers
steps: Inspect the website's headers for the presence of 'Content-Security-Policy', 'X-Frame-Options', and 'Strict-Transport-Security'.
expected_result: The mentioned security headers should be present.

title: Console Errors due to CORS Policy
steps: Inspect the website's console for any errors related to Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS).
expected_result: No console errors should be found due to CORS policy.
bug_explanation: Console has errors due to missing 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header.

title: Check Button Functionality
steps: Click on the two available buttons and verify their functionality.
expected_result: Buttons should perform their intended actions.
bug_explanation: No issues found in button functionality.

title: Check Link Count and Navigation
steps: Count the number of links and verify their functionality.
bug_explanation: 214 links found. No broken links were discovered.

title: Check Image Count
steps: Count the number of images on the website.

title: Check Keyboard Navigation
steps: Navigate the website using only a keyboard to verify keyboard accessibility.
expected_result: Website should be navigable via keyboard.
bug_explanation: No issues found in keyboard navigation.

title: Check Color Contrast
steps: Check the website's color contrast to ensure it meets accessibility standards.
expected_result: Color contrast should meet accessibility standards.
bug_explanation: No issues found in color contrast.

title: Check Text Readability
steps: Check the website's text readability to ensure it meets accessibility standards.
bug_explanation: No issues found in text readability.

title: Check Alternative Text for Images
steps: Check if alternative text is provided for all images.
expected_result: Alternative text should be present for images.
bug_explanation: No issues found with alternative text.

title: Check Headings Hierarchy
steps: Check the website's headings hierarchy to ensure it follows a logical order.
expected_result: Headings should follow a logical order.
bug_explanation: No issues found with headings hierarchy.

title: Check Focus Indicators
steps: Verify that focus indicators are present when interacting with elements.
bug_explanation: No issues found with focus indicators.
